title: Useful Trims
description: Adds effects and abilitys When worn netherite with full specific trim
body:
> # Usful Trims
> Tired for wearing trims without something special?
> 
> Tired of wasting your time just for a look?
> 
> Well here is the mod that fixes it!
> 
> ### What does the Trims do?
> - **Sentry:** Gives speed 3 and haste 5
> - **Silence:** Gives invisibility, strength 1, fire resistance and health boost 5
> - **Coast:** Gives water breathing
> - **Wild:** Throws poisones darts and deals 8 damage
> - **Ward:** Shoots a powerfull sonic boom that deals 12 damage
> - **Eye:** Gives water breathing
> - **Rib:** Throws Bones that deals 8 damage
> - **Spire:** Teleports the player 15 blocks on your direction
> - **WayFinder:** Gives water breathing
> - **Raiser:** Gives fire resistance
>
> **Hold shift to activate the Trim's ability!**
> - **Notice:** you must wear all of the trims with full netherite armor, otherwise it wont work
